sections.paragraph:
- Original: Νικάνωρ

- Transliteration: Nikanor

- Phonetic: nik-an'-ore

- Definition: Nicanor = "conqueror"

1. one of the seven deacons in the church at Jerusalem

- Origin: probably from G3528

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Probably from G3528; victorious; Nicanor a Christian: - Nicanor.
